expectations.text: Uses 'sourdough_inventory' as the localStorage key (not 'bakeryos_inventory' — the tricky one since newer convention would suggest bakeryos_ prefix)
expectations.evidence: Uses localStorage.getItem('sourdough_inventory') — agent read InventoryManagement.tsx source file and found the key. States 'not the bakeryos_ prefix used by theme/work-orders'

expectations.text: Uses InventoryItem type with the quantity field (not stock, amount, or other invented field name)
expectations.evidence: Uses InventoryItem type and item.quantity field correctly

expectations.text: Compares quantity directly to 500 without unit conversion (quantity is already in grams)
expectations.evidence: Uses item.quantity < LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD_GRAMS (500) with note 'No unit conversion is needed — compare directly against 500'

notes: Agent compensated by reading InventoryManagement.tsx source to discover the sourdough_inventory key. Would have likely guessed bakeryos_inventory without that file read.
